S.FORM: == kakawit == u zuma a kamu: nu Hu lam:鐮刀 nu Amilika: sickle nu Zipun:鎌 ((tangan:.Jjapanese-sickle-kama,katori-city,japan.JPG|thumb|nu Zipunan a kakawit)) u canan ku ː sapihica ku ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinenganː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenganː ==
S.PHON: == kakawit == u zuma a kamu: nu ħu r~ɾam:** nu amir~ɾika: siʦkr~ɾə nu zipun:* ((taŋan:.*japanəsə-siʦkr~ɾə-kama,katori-ʦitj,japan.*pg|tħumb|nu zipunan a kakawit)) u ʦanan ku * sapiħiʦa ku * namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan* == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan* ==
S.FORM: == kakawit == u zuma a kamu: nu Hu lam:鐮刀 nu Amilika: sickle nu Zipun:鎌 ((tangan:.Jjapanese-sickle-kama,katori-city,japan.JPG|thumb|nu Zipunan a kakawit)) u canan ku ː sapihica ku ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinenganː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenganː ==
S.PHON: == kakawit == u zuma a kamu: nu ħu r~ɾam:** nu amir~ɾika: siʦkr~ɾə nu zipun:* ((taŋan:.*japanəsə-siʦkr~ɾə-kama,katori-ʦitj,japan.*pg|tħumb|nu zipunan a kakawit)) u ʦanan ku * sapiħiʦa ku * namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan* == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan* ==
